channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in C++ nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 ghostty-org/ghostling (831 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ghostty-org

📝 Repository: ghostty-org/ghostling

📄 Descrizione: A minimum viable terminal emulator built on top of the libghostty C API. Ex minimo, infinita nascuntur. 👻🐣

⭐ Stelle: 831

🍴 Forks: 27

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-20T19:31:34Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-26T03:24:28Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 mauriziofonte/toktoken (40 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: mauriziofonte

📝 Repository: mauriziofonte/toktoken

📄 Descrizione: TokToken is a fast, single-binary C codebase indexer for AI coding agents. Powered by universal-ctags and SQLite FTS5, it provides precise symbol search, dependency tracking, and an MCP server. TokToken reduces LLM context token usage by 88-99% by retrieving exact code symbols instead of reading entire files. Zero runtime dependencies.

⭐ Stelle: 40

🍴 Forks: 9

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-15T12:27:38Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-21T03:23:14Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 willockrudi/mt7902-linux-driver (16 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: willockrudi

📝 Repository: willockrudi/mt7902-linux-driver

📄 Descrizione: Linux Wi-Fi driver for MediaTek MT7902 — the chip that ships in several ASUS laptops with zero upstream Linux support. Patches the MT7921-based mt76 driver to fix the CMD TX ring interrupt mask (bit 27 → bit 17), enabling firmware load and full Wi-Fi on kernel 6.x.

⭐ Stelle: 16

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-27T15:28:43Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-29T15:36:52Z

item.title: 📝 Asdf4311/camel (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Asdf4311

📝 Repository: Asdf4311/camel

📄 Descrizione: 由大眾點評開發的軟負載平衡解決方案，負責在 F5 後端進行流量分配，並作為網路基礎架構中的關鍵層發揮作用。

⭐ Stelle: 11

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-23T05:22:59Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-27T04:50:36Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
